params.name: Hillary's Pickaxe
params.description:
On Jul 30, 1953, this pickaxe became a world legend.

It's owner, Hillary, used it to climb Mt. Everest and became the first human to reach the top of the world! This legendary pick also became famous as it has conquered the highest mountain in the world. Since then, it has created many legends with Hillary. 

[Achievements of the Pick]

Climbed 11 Himalayan mountains. Went on an expedition across Antarctica and reached the source of the Yangtze River. Climbed the 8463-meter-high Mt. Makalu.
